creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fails building with libmicrohttpd 0.9.71

Reported upstream:
https://github.com/cinemast/libjson-rpc-cpp/issues/298

Possible fix:
https://github.com/cinemast/libjson-rpc-cpp/pull/299

I tried updating this port to latest upstream (version 1.3.0) but it fails even without the patch.
